subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Average time complexity of Bubble Sort:
explanation: Bubble Sort average: O(n²).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Best case of Bubble Sort:
explanation: Best case: O(n).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Worst case of Bubble Sort:
explanation: Worst case: O(n²).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Space complexity of Bubble Sort:
explanation: Space: O(1).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Bubble Sort is stable:
explanation: Stable — equal elements maintain relative order is preserved.

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Bubble Sort is in-place:
explanation: In-place: only O(1) extra memory.
